code_dossier.name: RedisConfig.java
code_dossier.description: Spring Boot Redis configuration class that customizes RedisTemplate with specific serializers for key-value operations in the authentication provider service.

data.detailed_description:
This component is a Spring Boot configuration class responsible for setting up Redis connectivity and serialization strategies within the authentication provider module. It creates and configures a RedisTemplate bean that serves as the primary interface for Redis operations throughout the application.

The configuration specifically:
1. Establishes a RedisTemplate with String keys and Object values, providing flexibility for storing various authentication-related data
2. Injects the RedisConnectionFactory (auto-configured by Spring Boot) to manage Redis connections
3. Configures StringRedisSerializer for keys, ensuring human-readable key names in Redis
4. Configures GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer for values, enabling JSON serialization/deserialization of complex Java objects

This configuration is crucial for the auth-provider service as Redis is commonly used for:
- Session management and token storage
- Caching authentication/authorization data
- Rate limiting and temporary data storage for security features

The placement in the auth-provider module suggests Redis is used for centralized session/token management in a distributed authentication system.
responsibilities: Configure and expose RedisTemplate bean for Redis operations across the authentication service
Define key serialization strategy using StringRedisSerializer for readable Redis keys
Define value serialization strategy using GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer for JSON-based object storage
Integrate Redis connection factory into the template for connection management

interfaces.name: redisTemplate

parameters.name: factory
parameters.description: Spring-managed Redis connection factory for establishing Redis connections

interfaces.description: Creates and configures a RedisTemplate bean with custom serializers for String keys and JSON-serialized Object values
